CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Continued To Jun-13-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition For Declaratory Relief On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 20, 2003.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Esq. eporter: Patricia Dowling. Fredrik Emilson, Esq. represented Plaintiff James J. Byrnes. The Court receives evidence and grants judgment in favor of the plaintiffs as follows: Attorney Fees: $1,000.00, Costs: $300.00 for a total of $1,300.00. The Court also declares that plaintiffs are entitled to withdraw Defendant Olubayo Johnson's tenancy from coverage by the San Francisco Rent Ordinances. Judgment signed.
